buttons.name: ⌂ {{ states('sensor.average_main_floor_temp') }} C
buttons.image:
{% set mapper =
  { 'breezy':'cloudy',
    'clear-night':'night',
    'clear':'day',
    'mostly-clear':'day',
    'clear-day':'day',
    'cloudy':'cloudy',
    'fog':'fog',
    'hail':'rainy-7',
    'haze':'haze',
    'lightning':'thunder',
    'mostly-cloudy':'cloudy',
    'partlycloudy':'cloudy-day-3',
    'partly-cloudy-day':'partly-cloudy-day',
    'partly-cloudy-night':'partly-cloudy-night',
    'rain':'rainy-4',
    'scattered-showers':'rainy-3',
    'showers':'rainy-6',
    'sleet':'sleet',
    'snow':'snowy-6',
    'mostly-sunny':'day',
    'sunny':'day',
    'thunderstorm':'thunder',
    'tornado':'tornado',
    'wind':'wind',
    'windy':'wind'} %}
{% set state = states('weather.maison_2') %}
{% set weather = mapper[state] if state in mapper else 'weather' %}
{% set path = '/local/icons/weather_icons/animated/' %}
{% set ext = '.svg'%}
  {{[path,weather,ext]|join('')}}

header.title: Thermal Profile - Air, Dew Point, Humidity

card_mod.style: ha-card { border-radius: 24px; background: rgba(13, 21, 33, .62); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.28); }
ha-card { border-radius: 24px; background: rgba(13, 21, 33, .62); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.28); }
ha-card { border-radius: 24px; background: rgba(13, 21, 33, .62); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.28); }
ha-card { border-radius: 24px; background: rgba(13, 21, 33, .62); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.28); }

cards.title: Weather Guru
cards.subtitle: Fredericton / Southern York County Nowcast Desk

background.image: radial-gradient(circle at 15% 10%, rgba(94,234,212,.35) 0, transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 86% 4%, rgba(250,204,21,.26) 0, transparent 24%), linear-gradient(135deg, #06131f 0%, #12324a 42%, #5a6f75 100%)

card_mod.style: ha-card { border-radius: 28px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(248,252,255,.96), rgba(224,243,255,.88)) !important; color: #10202f !important; --primary-text-color: #10202f; --secondary-text-color: #40566a; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.62); box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(4, 14, 28, .28); backdrop-filter: blur(22px); }

ha-card { border-radius: 28px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(248,252,255,.96), rgba(224,243,255,.88)) !important; color: #10202f !important; --primary-text-color: #10202f; --secondary-text-color: #40566a; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.62); box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(4, 14, 28, .28); backdrop-filter: blur(22px); }

ha-card { border-radius: 22px; background: rgba(249, 252, 255, .92) !important; color: #10202f !important; --primary-text-color: #10202f; --secondary-text-color: #40566a; --card-primary-color: #10202f; --card-secondary-color: #40566a; --ha-card-border-color: rgba(24, 54, 80, .16); border: 1px solid rgba(24, 54, 80, .18); box-shadow: 0 16px 38px rgba(7, 18, 32, .20); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); }

cards.content:
## Forecast Brief
**Now:** {{ states("sensor.fredericton_current_condition") }} · {{ states("sensor.fredericton_temperature") }}°C, humidity {{ state_attr("weather.fredericton", "humidity") }}%, pressure {{ state_attr("weather.fredericton", "pressure") }} {{ state_attr("weather.fredericton", "pressure_unit") }}.

**Today:** {{ states("sensor.fredericton_summary") }}

**Range:** high {{ states("sensor.fredericton_high_temperature") }}°C / low {{ states("sensor.fredericton_low_temperature") }}°C. Precipitation chance {{ states("sensor.fredericton_chance_of_precipitation") }}%. Wind {{ states("sensor.fredericton_wind_direction") }} at {{ states("sensor.fredericton_wind_speed") }} km/h. UV {{ states("sensor.fredericton_uv_index") }}. Visibility {{ states("sensor.fredericton_visibility") }} km.
